name: hermes-agent
description: An AI agent with advanced tool-calling capabilities, featuring a flexible toolsets system for organizing and managing tools.

scripts.postinstall: echo '✅ Browser tools ready. Run: python run_agent.py --help'
scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:server
scripts.build:web: pnpm --dir web install && pnpm --dir web run build
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n web,stack -c magenta,cyan "cross-env HERMES_DASHBOARD_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3080 pnpm --dir web dev" "cross-env PORT=3080 HERMES_INTERNAL_PORT=19119 node server/index.js"
